EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ICancelTracker

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the Cancel Tracker. Implementing class must be appartment-free, e.g. FTM.

[Guid("82F8DC98-B53E-41E0-97D4-F9442A12AA0D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICancelTracker

Properties

IsCanceled

Returns True, when the operations is canceled.

bool IsCanceled { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Cancel()

Sets the cancel tracker to the canceled state, i.e. IsCanceled is True.

void Cancel()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Reset()

Sets the cancel tracker to the non-canceled state, i.e. IsCanceled is False.

void Reset()

Examples
